round2_improvement_notes.linguistic: Agent had no Round 1 evidence to improve upon; correctly remained silent.
round2_improvement_notes.landscape: Acknowledged other agents' evidence (delineator posts, camera rig) to reinforce the USA hypothesis, though the conclusion did not change.
round2_improvement_notes.botanics: Synthesized cross-agent evidence (infrastructure, meta-data) to increase confidence in the US High Plains hypothesis.
round2_improvement_notes.regulatory: Incorporated landscape and meta evidence to refine the probability of the US over Canada, though the core regulatory evidence remained static.
round2_improvement_notes.meta: Integrated landscape and regulatory findings to strengthen the US fleet identification.

verdict.judge_synthesis_notes: The judge correctly identified the US as the location and eliminated Mexico. However, the synthesis text cuts off mid-sentence ('Road markings: Yellow center line, wh [...]'), preventing a full evaluation of the elimination logic for Canada. The reasoning provided is sound but incomplete.
